Table 11: Choice of layout algorithms by LLM (ChatGPT-40-mini), VM (DINOv2 Tune + Soft Multiclass) and Human. Note that the “Human Count” column has a total of 5557 labels, because each of the 1000 test graphs has, on average, 5.56 labels by different human labelers.
Figure 4: Human-human, LLM-human and VM-human alignment visualization. Here we pick the seven most prolific human labelers.
